sections.heading: Introduction
paragraphs: The OCR system in this repository extracts structured text from receipt imagery to support downstream processing and system evaluation.

sections.heading: OCR Workflow
paragraphs: The workflow acquires receipt images, applies preprocessing and optional layout analysis, runs OCR, and normalizes the extracted text for application use.

sections.heading: Technologies Used
paragraphs: The implementation combines FastAPI-based services with OCR and computer vision libraries, including PaddleOCR, VietOCR, Ultralytics models, and supporting Python infrastructure.
